zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD维持在2031附近窄幅波动，24小时振幅有限，显示市场观望情绪较浓。价格明显运行于20日均线2065下方，短线结构仍偏空，反弹动能暂时不足，多头尚未形成有效突破。

从技术指标看，MACD维持负值，说明中短期空头力量依旧占优，市场处于弱势整理阶段。虽然RSI数据缺失，但结合价格贴近日内低位判断，盘面仍存在一定下行压力，资金追涨意愿偏低。

关键支撑位关注2030与2000整数关口，若失守可能进一步测试1980区域；上方阻力首先位于2035，其次是2065附近的20日均线压制，只有重新站稳均线，趋势才可能转向修复。

交易策略方面，短线建议以区间震荡思路为主，激进交易者可关注2030附近低吸机会，但需严格设置止损。若价格突破2065并放量，可考虑顺势跟进多单；若跌破2000，则应防范空头进一步扩大。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum remains under moderate bearish pressure after failing to reclaim the 20-day SMA near 2065.79. The current price around 2031.36 reflects weak momentum and a compressed intraday range between 2030.70 and 2035.55, suggesting indecision among traders. Price action below the short-term moving average indicates sellers still control the broader near-term structure. Unless ETH establishes sustained movement above 2045–2050, upside attempts may continue to face resistance from profit-taking and cautious sentiment.

The MACD reading at -22.07 signals persistent downside momentum, although the absence of a signal-line crossover limits confirmation strength. Negative MACD territory generally reflects fading bullish participation and a continuation of corrective movement. RSI data is unavailable, but the narrow consolidation range implies momentum conditions may be stabilizing after recent selling pressure. If volatility expands with increased buying volume, Ethereum could attempt a short-term recovery toward the moving-average resistance zone.

Key support is developing around 2030, which currently acts as an immediate defensive level for buyers. A break below this region could expose ETH to deeper retracement toward 2000 and potentially 1985 if bearish momentum accelerates. On the upside, resistance remains clustered around 2045 and the stronger barrier near 2065, aligned with the SMA(20). A decisive breakout above the moving average would improve short-term sentiment and potentially shift momentum toward the 2100 region.

Short-term traders may prefer a cautious range-trading approach until clearer directional confirmation emerges. Bullish setups become more attractive only if Ethereum closes convincingly above 2065 with expanding volume and stronger momentum confirmation. Conversely, aggressive bearish traders may monitor breakdown opportunities below 2030, especially if macro market sentiment weakens further. Risk management remains essential, as current low-volatility conditions can quickly transition into sharp directional moves once liquidity and momentum return to the market.
